separation: HARN_ reason codes identify repository governance harness findings only. They are not Proofrail product Verdict reason codes, Evidence Bundle reason codes, API reason codes, or product Policy reason codes.

codes.summary: The active Foundation plan does not name the configured next task.
codes.remediation: Update the active plan or governance config so the next task is explicit.

codes.summary: AGENTS.md declares an authority route that is not declared by the Documentation Authority Index projection.
codes.remediation: Route AGENTS.md to an indexed authoritative document or update the Product Constitution authority index.

codes.summary: A Documentation Authority Index reference is malformed.
codes.remediation: Use This document or a local Markdown link in the authoritative location column.

codes.summary: A Documentation Authority Index target does not exist.
codes.remediation: Fix the authority link or restore the referenced local document.

codes.summary: The Documentation Authority Index contains duplicate topics.
codes.remediation: Keep one authority row per topic.

codes.summary: An authoritative canonical term is missing from the governance config projection input.
codes.remediation: Update governance/foundation.config.json or remove the unauthorized terminology heading.

codes.summary: A configured canonical term is missing from the terminology authority.
codes.remediation: Update the terminology authority or remove the stale configured term.

codes.summary: The terminology authority contains duplicate canonical term headings.
codes.remediation: Merge or rename duplicate canonical term headings through authorized terminology work.

codes.summary: The authoritative Verdict section differs from the allowed canonical Verdict set.
codes.remediation: Restore the canonical Verdict headings or stop for external authority review.

codes.summary: The configured canonical Verdict set differs from the allowed canonical Verdict set.
codes.remediation: Restore governance/foundation.config.json to the canonical Verdict vocabulary.

codes.summary: The Verdict authority contains duplicate canonical Verdict headings.
codes.remediation: Remove duplicate Verdict headings without changing Verdict semantics.

codes.summary: The Foundation governance config does not satisfy its JSON Schema.
codes.remediation: Update governance/foundation.config.json to match governance/foundation.config.schema.json.

codes.summary: The validator emitted a finding code not registered in the HARN_ registry.
codes.remediation: Register the HARN_ code or correct the validator to emit a registered code.

codes.summary: The repository contains inherited identity text from an unrelated project.
codes.remediation: Replace inherited identity text with Proofrail identity.

codes.summary: A required JSON file could not be read and parsed.
codes.remediation: Restore valid JSON at the referenced path.

codes.summary: A local Markdown link references a missing anchor.
codes.remediation: Fix the anchor or restore the referenced heading.

codes.summary: A local Markdown link references a missing file.
codes.remediation: Fix the link target or restore the referenced file.

codes.summary: A committed Machine Task Contract JSON instance does not satisfy the schema.
codes.remediation: Update the task contract to satisfy governance/machine-task-contract.schema.json.

codes.summary: A Machine Task Contract does not require independent review.
codes.remediation: Set review.expectation to independent_review_required.

codes.summary: A Machine Task Contract allows reviewer reliance on Builder claim.
codes.remediation: Set review.reviewerMustNotRelyOnBuilderClaim to true.

codes.summary: The Machine Task Contract schema does not enforce required review constants.
codes.remediation: Restore const validation for independent review and Builder-claim separation.

codes.summary: A committed generated governance projection differs from the authoritative source.
codes.remediation: Run pnpm governance:generate and review the generated artifact.

codes.summary: The harness reason-code registry contains duplicate codes.
codes.remediation: Keep each HARN_ code unique.

codes.summary: The harness reason-code registry contains a malformed entry.
codes.remediation: Provide code, summary, and remediation strings for each registry entry.

codes.summary: The harness reason-code registry contains a code outside the HARN_ namespace.
codes.remediation: Use the HARN_ prefix for Foundation engineering harness findings only.

codes.summary: A required Foundation document or governance artifact is missing.
codes.remediation: Restore the required path or update governance config with authority.
